steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content:
Distribute on both sides, then combine like terms.
$$
10(x-4)=-2(x+20)
$$
$$
10x-40=-2x-40
$$
$$
12x=0
$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: The equation has a nonzero coefficient on $x$, so it has one value that works. $$ x=0 $$ The answer is A.
